headline: Assessing PulteGroup (PHM) Valuation After Recent Pullback And Conflicting Fair Value Views
summary: Why PulteGroup (PHM) is on investors’ radar today PulteGroup (PHM) is drawing attention after a recent pullback, with the stock roughly 11% lower over the past month. This move is prompting investors to reassess how its current valuation lines up with recent business results. See our latest analysis for PulteGroup. That recent 11% 30 day share price decline sits against a relatively flat year to date share price return of about 1% lower, while the 1 year total shareholder return of 20.95%...
